findings.evidence: `SubgroupFiberOrbit.lean:50-72` matches `FiberOrbit.lean:52-71` with `Deck p` replaced by `H`; `SubgroupFiberOrbit.lean:156-190` follows `FiberOrbit.lean:73-99` using the same `Quotient.congr`/`fiberMap` transport pattern, while lines 33-38 credit only the roadmap.
findings.fix: Add an explicit reference noting that this is the subgroup-level analogue/adaptation of `TauCeti.AlgebraicTopology.UniversalCover.Deck.FiberOrbit` and its `fiberOrbitClass`, `fiberOrbitQuotientEquiv`, and fibre transport/conjugation lemmas.
findings.issue: The References section omits the central formal source this file generalizes: `TauCeti.Deck.FiberOrbitQuotient` and its transport API; the new declarations mirror the theorem order and proof plan of `Deck/FiberOrbit.lean`.

summary: The roadmap and generic Mathlib orbit quotient are credited, but the file closely adapts the existing TauCeti fibre-orbit API without naming that formal source in the References section.
